title: Teltonika TRM250 Industrial Cellular Modem
description: TRM250 is an Industrial Cellular modem with multiple LPWAN connectivity options. It features NB-IoT, LTE Cat-M1 and is backwards compatible with EGPRS (2G) It offers an extremely long lifecycle and is the most flexible option when upgrading the connectivity of existing industrial equipment TRM250 is equipped with a USB interface, a rugged aluminium housing and is designed for large scale IIoT deployments Key features: LTE (Cat-M1) / NB-IoT / EGPRS communications, 1 x mini SIM (2FF), 1 x SMA for LTE, 5V powered via microUSB Device 1x Mobile antenna (swivel, SMA male) Micro-USB cable (0.8 m) 1x Hex key QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM), LTE Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 1 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) SMA female SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 USB Yes Power Power type USB (5V) Max. power consumption [W] 3,6 Power via connector/terminal 5V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP30 Design Desktop Purpose Indoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 130 Width [mm] 75 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 65
